channel.title: BlackFog
channel.description: AI Security for Data Exfiltration, Shadow AI and Ransomware Prevention

item.title: DaVita Ransomware Attack: 2.7M Affected in Major Data Breach
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Harpur
item.description: The DaVita ransomware attack exposed 2.7 million patient records. Learn what happened, what data was stolen, and how the Interlock gang pulled it off.

item.title: Confronting INC Ransom: BlackFog’s Prevention-First Strategy for Affiliate-Driven Ransomware
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Harpur
item.description: Confronting INC Ransom, BlackFog’s Prevention-First Strategy for Affiliate-Driven Ransomware.

item.title: CamoLeak: How GitHub Copilot Became An Exfiltration Channel
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Harpur
item.description: CamoLeak (CVE-2025-59145) turned GitHub Copilot into a silent data exfiltration channel via prompt injection and GitHub's own image proxy. CVSS 9.6.

item.title: The State of Ransomware: March 2026
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Harpur
item.description: BlackFog's state of ransomware March 2026 measures publicly disclosed and non-disclosed attacks globally.

item.title: Venom Stealer Turns ClickFix Into a Full Exfiltration Pipeline
item.dc:creator: Darren Williams
item.description: BlackFog analyzes Venom Stealer, a new MaaS infostealer that uses ClickFix delivery to launch an automated exfiltration pipeline covering credential theft, wallet cracking, and fund sweeping.

item.title: What Enterprises Need To Know About Cyber Governance, Risk And Compliance
item.dc:creator: Brenda Robb
item.description: Learn all about cyber governance, risk and compliance in 2026 and why this must be a consideration at the highest levels of all organizations.

item.title: Navigating Essential Cybersecurity Compliance Standards: What To Know
item.dc:creator: Brenda Robb
item.description: There are a range of cybersecurity compliance standards firms of all sizes must deal with, including mandatory and voluntary frameworks. Here's what you need to know.

item.title: Understanding The Requirements Of Information Security Compliance
item.dc:creator: Brenda Robb
item.description: Learn precisely what information security compliance entails and the various steps that go into making this effective.

item.title: The Importance Of Effective Cybersecurity Services For Small Businesses
item.dc:creator: Brenda Robb
item.description: Find out why cybersecurity services for small businesses are more in-demand than ever as cybercriminals shift their focus to less-sizable enterprises.

item.title: Cybersecurity Compliance: What You Need Without Hiring A CISO
item.dc:creator: Brenda Robb
item.description: Find out what's required to ensure cybersecurity compliance and how this can be achieved without the need for a full-time CISO.

item.title: How Cybersecurity Startups Manage Compliance And Security Certifications
item.dc:creator: Brenda Robb
item.description: For cybersecurity startups, prioritizing compliance early builds trust, accelerates growth, and ensures security standards align with evolving threats and customer expectations.

item.title: How To Choose A Provider For Ongoing Cybersecurity Compliance Monitoring
item.dc:creator: Brenda Robb
item.description: Effective cybersecurity compliance monitoring requires real-time visibility, expert governance, and scalable solutions to keep organizations secure and audit-ready.
